untranslatable_reason: Diamond pattern formation requires visual/shape recognition not available in price/technical indicators. Pattern identification, breakout direction detection, and specific performance metrics (69% success rate for downward breakouts, average decline comparison) cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Position, Previous Bar, Returns, Bar Properties). A candlestick pattern recognition library would be required.
translation_notes: Signal describes a geometric chart pattern (Diamond) with direction-dependent behavior: upward breakouts = continuations, downward breakouts = reversals with 69% success rate. Without pattern detection capability, used pivot crossovers as a proxy for breakout mechanics, but this does not capture the underlying Diamond formation requirement or the asymmetric success rates cited. Author provided incomplete source text and marked most performance parameters as AUTHOR_SILENT.
